meta.title: Inside SpaceX’s Crew Dragon Capsule and HQ!!!
meta.description:
SpaceX allowed us a rare opportunity to actually go inside their headquarters to check out their new Crew Dragon Capsule that will be flying astronauts next year!

Shot by Patrick Lawler @PatrickLawler

More pics and article here - https://everydayastronaut.com/inside-spacex/

Everyday Astronaut hats, prints, shirts and more at - https://everydayastronaut.com/shop/

Show your support, get a chance to win flown hardware and join our  exclusive discord channel by becoming a Patron - http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut

Music by Everyday Astronaut - http://soundcloud.com/everydayastronaut
